entries.mem0ai/mem0: A universal memory layer and official Hermes Agent provider available as a managed cloud or self-hosted OSS. It utilizes hybrid retrieval and multi-level memory to track user, session, and agent state.
entries.supermemoryai/supermemory: An official Hermes Agent memory engine featuring a custom vector graph and byte-level deduplication. It delivers sub-300ms recall and maintains persistent memory graphs for personalized context across conversations.
entries.volcengine/OpenViking: An official open-source context database that uses a tiered L0/L1/L2 loading system to reduce token consumption. It organizes memories via a filesystem-based structure and provides visualized retrieval trajectories for debugging.
entries.garrytan/gbrain: An opinionated memory system that automatically extracts typed entity relationships into a self-wiring knowledge graph. It features a synthesis layer for cited prose answers and supports scoped data access for multi-user company brains.
entries.vectorize-io/hindsight: A learning-focused memory system that implements retain, recall, and reflect workflows for long-term knowledge. It acts as an LLM wrapper supporting providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini.
entries.campfirein/byterover-cli: An official provider that treats memory as a version-controlled git repository using a markdown context tree. It offers 5-tier retrieval with sub-100ms latency and supports branching and merging of agent context.
entries.plastic-labs/honcho: A stateful memory library that extracts reasoning-based conclusions rather than simple text chunks. It models multi-peer perspectives to track what different entities know about one another.
entries.greyhaven-ai/autocontext: A recursive self-improving harness that distills successful agent strategies into reusable playbooks. It provides structured output via trace.jsonl logs and supports integration through a CLI and MCP server.
entries.AxDSan/mn Postgres: A zero-dependency memory system utilizing a SQLite backend for sub-millisecond retrieval. It manages long-term knowledge through episodic compression and temporal triples.
entries.stephenschoettler/hermes-tool-slimmer: A utility that reduces prompt token overhead by using local BM25 ranking to select relevant tool schemas. It includes a dashboard to track token savings and is compatible with Hermes Agent v0.14.0.
entries.stephenschoettler/hermes-lcm: A lossless context management plugin that uses a hierarchical summary DAG for depth-aware compaction. It preserves raw messages in a SQLite store and provides specialized tools like lcm_grep for retrieval.
entries.elkimek/honcho-self-hosted: A self-hosted backend for Honcho that enables private cross-session persistence for Hermes Agent. It supports local inference servers and OpenAI-compatible providers via a Docker, PostgreSQL, and Redis setup.
entries.Signet-AI/signetai: A local-first identity and secrets layer that provides portable state across Hermes Agent, Claude Code, and MCP clients. It uses SQLite for storage and allows users to repair, edit, or reclassify agent context.
entries.yoloshii/ClawMem: An on-device context engine that eliminates cloud dependencies and API keys. It employs a hybrid retrieval approach combining BM25, vector search, and knowledge graphs.
entries.plur-ai/plur: A shared memory layer using an open YAML engram format to eliminate API costs in multi-agent systems. It utilizes ACT-R activation to strengthen relevant facts while decaying stale information.
entries.EfficientContext/ContextPilot: A context optimization tool that increases cache hits by 4–12× through prefix reordering and deduplication. It reduces prefill latency for RAG and agentic workloads across SGLang, vLLM, and llama.cpp.
entries.yantrikos/yantrikdb-hermes-plugin: An embedded, self-maintaining plugin that provides explainable recall via why_retrieved tags. It tracks contradictions and canonicalizes duplicates without requiring a separate server or GPU.
entries.yepyhun/Brainstack: A memory kernel stack that consolidates temporal continuity, graph truth, and corpus retrieval. It leverages a multi-layered storage approach using SQLite, Kuzu, and Chroma to reduce prompt noise.
entries.keepnotes-ai/keep: A reflective memory system combining BM25 full-text search with ranked graph traversal. It automatically indexes local directories, URLs, and multimedia files using edge tags for navigable relationships.
entries.amanning3390/flowstate-qmd: An anticipatory memory system that prefetches context by monitoring agent session logs. It uses local-first storage with SQLite-vec and GGUF models via node-llama-cpp.
entries.Ladybug-Memory/hermes-memory-plugin: A local-only plugin using a columnar .lbdb embedded graph database for importance-weighted recall. It surfaces high-priority memories first and supports optional GLiNER2 entity extraction.
entries.MukundaKatta/hermes-agentmemory: A pull-model episodic memory plugin that ensures complete deletion of memories without leaving persistent summaries. It provides a trace.jsonl audit log for every operation and on-demand summarization.
entries.futurebrowser/hermes-exabase-plugin: A plugin that integrates Exabase M-1 for self-organizing long-term memory. It provides tools for manual storage and configurable query expansion for improved retrieval reranking.

entries.nexu-io/open-design: A local-first design and prototyping system that enables Hermes Agent to generate prototypes, decks, and motion graphics. It integrates with 21 local CLIs via an MCP server and provides access to 150 design systems and 261 plugins.
entries.mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills: A library of 754 structured cybersecurity skills mapped to industry frameworks like MITRE ATT&CK and NIST CSF 2.0. It utilizes the agentskills.io standard to enable sub-second skill discovery across 26 security domains.
entries.Agents365-ai/drawio-skill: Allows for the generation of draw.io diagrams from natural language, supporting presets for ERD, UML, and Architecture. It automates structure diagrams for languages including Python, Go, and Rust using over 10,000 official shapes.
entries.conorbronsdon/avoid-ai-writing: An auditing tool that eliminates detectable AI writing patterns through Rewrite, Detect, and Edit-in-place modes. It uses a 109-entry word replacement table and is compatible with Hermes and Claude Code.
entries.AMAP-ML/SkillClaw: An agentic evolver that automates skill deduplication and quality improvement through background evolution loops. It unifies skill libraries across teams and devices with native integration for Hermes and OpenAI-compatible APIs.
entries.wondelux/skills: A cross-platform library providing modular frameworks for UX design, product strategy, and architecture. It is compatible with Claude Code and agentskills.io and can be installed via a marketplace or CLI.
entries.Romanescu1/hermes-skill-factory: A meta-skill plugin that monitors active workflows to automatically propose and generate reusable skills. It produces both Python plugin scaffolds and SKILL.md documentation via dedicated slash commands.
entries.DougTrajan/pydantic-ai-skills: Provides type-safe agentskills.io support for Pydantic AI using progressive disclosure to reduce token usage. It supports both programmatic and filesystem-based skill definitions.
entries.ZeroPointRepo/youtube-skills: Enables Hermes Agent and other AI tools to extract transcripts, search videos, and browse channels without using yt-dlp. It provides structured access to captions and timestamps for enhanced video analysis.
entries.amanning339/hermeshub: A community hub for browsing and one-click installation of skills, featuring a creator marketplace with Stripe and crypto payments. It includes a security scanner with 65+ threat detection rules and an agent-to-agent feedback system.
entries.Cranot/super-hermes: Teaches Hermes Agent to write its own analytical prompts and custom thinking instructions for complex problems. It identifies codebase trade-offs and generates reports on analysis blind spots.
entries.ReinaMacCredy/maestro: A harness for long-running agents that implements gated lifecycles for tasks and features with local-first file storage. It supports cross-feature learning and integrates with Codex and Claude Code agents.
entries.tlehman/litprog-skill: A literate programming skill that weaves code and documentation into .lit.md files. It uses a tangler to extract runnable source files and automatically syncs edits back to the literate document.
entries.esaradev/icarus-plugin: Implements shared memory via markdown-based fabric directories to allow agents to remember work across instances. It includes a pipeline for extracting training data to fine-tune replacement models.
entries.AkoliteZA/hermes-agent-idea-workflow: A pre-build workflow that converts rough ideas into structured design documents and implementation handoffs. It offers Lite and Full modes and includes a spec review gate with PASS/FAIL evaluation models.
entries.smartcontractkit/chainlink-agent-skills: Provides agentskills.io compliant tools for interacting with the Chainlink oracle network and smart contracts. It supports CCIP cross-chain messaging, VRF v2.5 management, and Data Feed integration.
entries.armelhbobdad/bmad-module-skill-forge: Converts repositories, documentation, and developer discourse into agentskills.io-compliant skills. It supports version-pinned immutable skills and links instructions to specific file lines or URLs.
entries.black-forest-labs/skills: Official FLUX image generation skills providing standardized prompting guidelines for FLUX.1 and FLUX.2. It includes API integration patterns for webhooks and supports precise hex color specifications.
entries.chigwell/skilldock.io: A registry of reusable AI skills based on the AgentSkills specification featuring a Python client and CLI. It supports versioned uploads with recursive dependency resolution and integrated TON/Stripe payments.
entries.tiann/execplan-skill: Enables autonomous execution of complex, multi-step tasks with real-time progress tracking. It includes checkpoints and built-in rollback procedures for safe recovery from failures.
entries.cablate/Agentic-MCP-Skill: A progressive MCP client that uses three-layer lazy loading to minimize token consumption. It features a socket-based daemon for persistent server management and supports hot-reloading of JSON configurations.
entries.adnw-vinc/hermes-nextcloud: A Hermes Agent skill for managing Nextcloud files, calendars, and contacts via WebDAV and CalDAV. It communicates securely over HTTPS and includes a guided setup script for credential validation.
entries.PederHP/skillsdotnet: A C# / .NET implementation of agentskills.io that integrates with Microsoft.Extensions.AI for tool-based loading. It supports progressive disclosure via SKILL.md files and automatic directory registration.
entries.Sahil-SS9/hermes-multichannel-prompt-opt: A plugin that rewrites and scores prompts across surfaces like Discord, Telegram, and CLI to reduce token usage by 20–80%. It tailors prompt structures based on the specific model vendor's reasoning capabilities.
entries.willingning-coder/eagle-eye: A 5-layer retrieval system for Hermes Agent that uses FTS5, dense embeddings, and RRF fusion to filter 100+ skills down to the five most relevant. It offers zero-invasive integration with graceful dependency fallback.

entries.numtide/llm-agents.nix: This project provides a collection of Nix packages for various AI coding agents and CLIs, including Hermes. It features automated daily updates to ensure users always have access to the most recent tool versions within a reproducible Nix environment.
entries.marshallrichards/ClawPhone: ClawPhone offers specialized scripts and configuration guides for running agent CLIs on ARM64 Android devices via Termux. It integrates with Termux:API and Termux:GUI, allowing Hermes and other OpenClaw agents to interact directly with smartphone hardware.
entries.rookiemann/portable-hermes-agent: This zero-install Windows desktop solution provides a GUI-driven Hermes experience with 100 built-in tools and local model support via LM Studio. It functions as a portable automation engine, allowing users to build custom workflow pipelines without requiring Docker or complex installations.
entries.AbuZar-Ansarii/Hermes-Agent-On-Android: Designed for mobile privacy and cost-efficiency, this project features a one-line Termux installer for running Hermes Agent locally on Android. It supports over 200 models, including local execution via Ollama and remote access through major API providers.
entries.ultraworkers/hermes-agent-helm-chart: This community Helm chart enables cloud-native deployment of Hermes Agent on Kubernetes with a focus on state safety. It enforces single-writer storage patterns and offers configurable gateway modes, making it suitable for operator-ready production workflows.
entries.TheAiSingularity/hermesclaw: Hermesclaw provides a high-security sandbox for Hermes Agent using kernel-level enforcement to restrict network, filesystem, and process access. It allows users to apply dynamic security policies while integrating the agent with IDEs, MCP servers, and messaging platforms.
entries.xmbshwll/hermes-agent-docker: This project offers a streamlined Docker image that bundles the official Hermes installation with mini-swe-agent in a sandboxed environment. It supports persistent state through mounted directories and allows users to build specific versions of Hermes using build arguments.
entries.0xrsydn/nix-hermes-agent: This NixOS module enables declarative management of Hermes deployments, including systemd service configuration and secure secrets handling via sops-nix. It bridges the gap between Nix-managed reproducibility and interactive CLI usage for a hybrid deployment model.
entries.JackTheGit/hermes-autonomous-server: Focused on production-ready headless operation, this tool configures Hermes Gateway as a reboot-safe systemd service on Ubuntu and Debian. It is specifically designed for autonomous execution of recurring AI cron jobs and integration with the Nous Portal.
entries.jpalmae/hermeshq: HermesHQ acts as a Docker-first control plane for orchestrating multiple Hermes Agent instances from a single web application. It features workspace isolation, task scheduling, and inter-agent delegation, providing an enterprise-grade management layer for complex agent hierarchies.
entries.ellickjohnson/portainer-stack-hermes: This deployment option provides a Docker Compose stack optimized for Portainer, featuring a ttyd web terminal for remote browser-based access. It simplifies management through a Git Repository stack and utilizes GitHub Actions for automated image builds.

entries.builderz-labs/mission-control: A self-hosted orchestration layer that allows users to dispatch tasks and monitor spending across multi-agent workflows. It features a dependency-free SQLite stack and the Aegis review system to ensure high-quality task gates across CrewAI, LangGraph, and AutoGen.
entries.agent-of-empires/agent-of-empires: A management surface providing TUI and PWA dashboards to monitor various coding agents, including Hermes and Claude Code. It ensures secure execution through Docker, Podman, and Apple Container sandboxing while utilizing git worktrees for parallel agent operations.
entries.CryptoDmitry/hermes-agent-control-room: A control-room template designed to scale Hermes deployments from a single VPS agent to complex specialist teams. It implements a sidecar control plane for governance and utilizes task bus patterns for structured delegation.
entries.Agent-3-7/minions: A supervision hub that lets users create and review autonomous Hermes Agent work via a centralized screen. It features a Kanban board for status tracking and live streaming of agent reasoning for human-in-the-loop verification.
entries.swarmclawai/swarmclaw: A framework for building autonomous agent swarms with support for over 23 LLM providers, including Ollama and Hermes. It manages swarms through heartbeats and schedules, featuring durable memory and the ability to learn new skills from conversations.
entries.shannhk/hermes-agent-control-room: A scaling template that uses a level-based architecture to transition from single agents to automated teams. It includes a task bus for handoffs and bundled skills for VPS provisioning, security auditing, and backup management.
entries.linke-ai/hermes-agent-team: A local collaboration system that orchestrates Leader and Specialist agents using MCP and ACP protocols. It provides a real-time Web UI to monitor agent dialogues and manage the task lifecycle via Hermes Kanban.
entries.1ilkhamov/opencode-hermes-multiagent: A specialized collective of 17 agents dedicated to research, planning, and implementation. The system enforces strict quality gates through mandatory reviewer and tester agents to secure infrastructure and refactoring pipelines.
entries.howdymary/hermes-agent-metaharness: A meta-optimization harness that uses automated outer-loop searches to refine agent code. It orchestrates TBLite and TB2 benchmark evaluations to track performance frontiers through structured mutation and comparison.
entries.runtimenoteslabs/gladiator: An agent-vs-agent arena where autonomous AI companies compete for GitHub stars. It orchestrates nine agents using Paperclip and Hermes Agent, visualizing the competition via a real-time scoreboard and task dashboard.
entries.Rainhoole/hermes-agent-acp-skill: An ACP-style delegation tool that routes tasks between Hermes subagents, Codex, and Claude Code. It prevents parent context pollution through isolated workflows and enforces safety via configurable timeouts and output limits.

entries.colbymchenry/codegraph: A local pre-indexed code knowledge graph that optimizes agent performance by mapping symbol relationships and call graphs. It reduces tool calls by an average of 58% and lowers costs by 16% across macOS, Linux, and Windows.
entries.junhoyeo/tokscale: A high-performance Rust-based TUI for monitoring token usage across various clients, including Hermes Agent and Cursor. It provides a visual dashboard and 3D contribution graphs to track and analyze operational costs.
entries.liaohch3/claude-tap: A local trace viewer designed to inspect API traffic, system prompts, and tool schemas for agents like Hermes. It allows developers to pinpoint context changes by comparing adjacent requests locally.
entries.joeynyc/hermes-skins: A collection of community-driven CLI themes that customize the Hermes terminal UI. Users can modify ASCII art, banner colors, and response labels using YAML configurations and themed presets.
entries.Salomondiei08/oh-my-hermes: An opinionated workflow layer that orchestrates 23 skills for the autonomous building and monitoring of applications. It automates tasks from GitHub issue triage to security reviews and integrates with Vercel, Supabase, and Sentry.
entries.AlexAI-MCP/hermes-CCC: A port of the Hermes Agent brain and 46 core skills directly into the Claude Code Channel. This integration eliminates the need for OAuth or external processes and includes MLOps tools for RL training and vLLM inference.
entries.unmodeled-tyler/vessel-browser: An AI-native browser that enables autonomous agent control via MCP. It features a human-in-the-loop interface with action rollback capabilities and durable session management through structured checkpoints.
entries.Abruptive/Ankh.md: A TAW Agent framework that allows for the creation of scoped Hermes Agents. It enables per-folder configurations, allowing developers to switch between default and project-local memories, tools, and instructions.
entries.adityahimaone/hermes-agent-rtk-caveman: A preconfigured setup utilizing RTK and Caveman templating to achieve 90-99% token savings. It includes over 40 specialized skills for research, finance, and devops with automated cross-platform installation.
entries.roli-lpci/lintlang: A deterministic static linter that scans agent configs and system prompts for failure modes without using LLM calls. It utilizes seven structural detectors (H1-H7) and integrates into CI/CD pipelines via JSON output.
entries.42-evey/evey-setup: A rapid deployment stack that uses Docker to launch Hermes Agent with LiteLLM, Ollama, and Qdrant. It provides a zero-cost environment featuring 29 community plugins for memory and quality validation.
entries.0xNyk/openclaw-to-hermes: A migration utility that transfers personas, memories, and workspace files from OpenClaw to Hermes Agent. It maps complex model configurations to Hermes YAML format and handles the transfer of system-level credentials.

entries.farion1231/cc-switch: A cross-platform manager built with Tauri 2 that provides a unified interface for Hermes Agent and other CLI agents like Claude Code and Gemini CLI. It serves as an all-in-one hub for managing multiple agent environments across Windows, macOS, and Linux.
entries.iOfficeAI/AionUi: A local open-source cowork app that integrates Hermes Agent and over 13 other CLI agents into a single GUI. It features a built-in engine for web search and MCP tools, with the unique ability to automatically generate editable Word, Excel, and Morph PPT documents.
entries.nesquena/hermes-webui: A lightweight web-based interface using Python and vanilla JavaScript that maintains full feature parity with the Hermes CLI. It utilizes a three-panel layout to provide workspace file browsing and inline previews for mobile and web users.
entries.fathah/hermes-desktop: A desktop companion app designed for the installation and configuration of local or remote Hermes Agent backends. It includes a GUI for managing personas, memory, and scheduled tasks, while integrating with 16 different messaging gateways.
entries.EKKOLearnAI/hermes-web-ui: A web dashboard focused on session management and multi-platform configuration for eight messaging channels including Discord and Slack. It supports multi-agent group chats with @mention routing and provides detailed usage analytics with token and cost tracking.
entries.outsourc-e/hermes-workspace: A native web workspace featuring a Monaco-powered file browser and a PTY terminal. It introduces Swarm Mode for role-based dispatch via tmux-backed workers, alongside a dedicated skills manager and MCP catalog.
entries.dodo-reach/hermes-desktop: A native macOS workspace that connects directly to Hermes hosts over SSH for real-time session data. It provides specialized native views for Kanban and files, including an embedded SSH terminal for direct shell access.
entries.xaspx/hermes-control-interface: A self-hosted web dashboard featuring the ZOO Swarm Monitor for pipeline tracking and live event feeds. It offers a comprehensive MCP server control plane with a config editor and real-time chat with tool call cards.
entries.jazzyalex/agent-sessions: A native macOS session browser and 'agent cockpit' used for indexing and searching histories across Hermes and other coding-agent CLIs. It prioritizes privacy with local-only indexing and provides tools for monitoring usage limits.
entries.nickvasilescu/hermes-desktop-os1: A macOS workspace specifically optimized for Hermes Agent instances running on SSH hosts or Orgo cloud computers. It enables one-click automated installations on cloud VMs and integrates WebRTC voice mode via OpenAI Realtime.
entries.Eynzof/hermes-agent-cn-desktop: A Windows-first desktop application built with Tauri, TypeScript, and Rust, tailored for the Chinese market. It includes a built-in Hermes Agent kernel with health checks and integrated management for profiles, memory, and MCP tools.
entries.liftaris/herm: An operator-focused TUI and dashboard built with OpenTUI for chat and profile switching. It features a native Eikon Marketplace for installing shared extensions and a Kanban board for monitoring agentic tasks.
entries.clawvader-tech/hermes-telegram-miniapp: A mobile-first React SPA designed as a Telegram Mini App with a terminal-style UI. It implements secure HMAC-SHA256 and Ed25519 authentication and supports vision analysis and OCR for file attachments.
entries.aivrar/portable-hermes-agent: A zero-install Windows desktop GUI that runs without Docker or admin rights, integrating local models via LM Studio. It comes pre-loaded with over 100 tools, including ComfyUI and MusicGen, and includes a dynamic tool maker for API wrappers.
entries.pyrate-llama/hermes-ui: A glassmorphic web interface consisting of a single-file React 18 application and a Python proxy. It provides real-time log streaming and a live workspace file browser for managing skills and cron jobs.
entries.sanchomuzax/hermes-webui: A monitoring and configuration dashboard that provides a real-time activity feed with model distribution and cost tracking. It allows for read-only inspection of skill sources and full-text search across conversation histories.
entries.Euraika-Labs/pan-ui: A self-hosted AI workspace featuring a chat-first interface with tool approval cards and SSE streaming. It includes an integrated marketplace for MCP servers and isolated profile management for separate API keys and memory.
entries.Felix-Forever/hermes-agent-desktop: A multi-agent desktop client that orchestrates collaboration between 20 specialized AI agents. It features a visual Skill Store with over 50 one-click installations and a PM orchestrator for managing streaming chat responses.
